description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Webcit before 7.11 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) the who parameter to showuser; and other vectors involving (2) calendar mode, (3) bulletin board mode, (4) room names, and (5) uploaded file names.
